title: Pinktsune Hardcore+
description: MC Hardcore modpack used by Pinktsune
body:
A modpack used by Pinktsune! Vanilla+ with some quality of life and slightly-altering-gameplay mods! Great for Survival, servers, and Hardcore worlds!

The modpack has been highly requested my Pinktsune's Twitch community, and now Pinktsune herself is sharing it with the world! 

This modpack came together over a course of about a year or two, slowly adding new mods to improve quality of life of a regular Minecraft (Survival or Hardcore) player. Izzy (Pinktsune) has been playing on their Hardcore world since September 2022, and is alive in it until this day, thanks to this modpack (and an insane amount of luck!). Some of her most cherished builds came together using this modpack, so who knows what it will help you achieve!

The modpack updates and changes regularly, so be sure to check in often!

This modpack uses Vanilla Tweaks Resource Packs and Datapacks! Make sure to check out their website **[https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)** prior to downloading if you wish to customize your own set of Vanilla Tweaks settings!
